[cron:4ae7274d-71b8-4220-8f42-bec7c7ba5a1a Lex ⚖️ — Legal Review Sweep (daily)] LEX_LEGAL_SWEEP: Daily legal review — Lex Rule 1 enforcement.

1. Read /Users/ainchorsoc2a/.openclaw/workspace/state/lex-qa-pending.json (if exists)
2. For each pending asset: run bash /Users/ainchorsoc2a/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/lex-check.sh with its metadata
3. For each item, also perform LLM-level legal review: read the asset content and original brief, apply L1-L5 checks with full legal reasoning, flag contractual risk, regulatory issues, liability, IP, missing disclosures. Note: Lex flags risk — not a substitute for qualified legal advice on matters >A$10,000
4. Write final verdict to lex-qa-log.json
5. If FAIL: write to /Users/ainchorsoc2a/.openclaw/workspace/state/lex-escalation-pending.json
6. If all clear or no pending items: output exactly 'LEX: clear' and stop.

Always output exactly one line. Never generate an empty response.
Current time: Saturday, July 18th, 2026 - 9:37 AM (Australia/Sydney)
Reference UTC: 2026-07-17 23:37 UTC
